calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Discover Bank.
No appearance by defendant Travis W. Delrio.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 7, 2009.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, July 20, 2009.
Declaration of Robert Adkins in Lieu of Personal Testimony Pursuant to CCP Section 98 was filed today, July 20, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Discover Bank, and against defendant Travis W. Delrio:

Principal - $4,269.35.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $225.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $4,494.35.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2009 Set For Trial On Jul-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Text Ruling
